titleStmt.title: SII 25.104: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 104. (A.R. No. 104 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.
This record may be assigned on palaeographical grounds to c. 12th13th century. The record is dated in the year 13, Vṛiśchika 23. These details do not admit verification.

It states that a certain Poṉṉanāgaraṉ who was guilty of having killed a brahman (brahmahatyai-paṇṇi) was in punishment therefore, tied upto the legs of a he-buffalo (kiḍā) and dragged along the place. To meet the expenses to be incurred at the place where the above punishment is meted out, a merchant named Tiruchchiṟṟambala-muḍaiyār-uttamaṉ of Neḍuvāyil purchased and made a gift of land as maḍappuṟam to the Tiruttaṇḍattogaiyaṉtirumaḍam situated at the southern entrance of the Tiruttaḷiyāṇḍār temple at Tirupputtūr and the mūlaparushai-mahsabhai of Tirupputtūr in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu which met in the ambalam (hall) called Dayāpañjaram received from Uttamaṉ a lump-sum amount of 75 śōḻiya-naṟ-paḻaṅ-kāśu and made the land endowed by him, free from the payment of taxes.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī tribhuvana cakravattikaḷ śrī kulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3 vṛścikanāyaṟṟu 2 10 3ntiyati nāḷ
keraḷaciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyan=tiruputtūr mūlaparuṣai mahāsabhaiyom nammuram pa
lam dayāpañjaranil kūṭakkuṟaivaṟakkūṭi Irun=tu muṉpu Ivūril brahmahatyai paṇṇip po
ṉa poṉṉannakaraṉaikkiṭāviṉ kāliṟkaṭṭi Iḻutta vaṭattu veṇṭum viniyokattukku
tiruttaḷiyāṇṭār śrī koyil teṟkil tiruvācalil tiruttoṇṭat tokaiyaṉ tiru
maṭattukku tirumaṭappuṟamāka viyāpāri neṭuvāyiluṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyā
ṉ Uttama vilaikoṇṭuviṭṭa nilam Ivūr vaṭavāy vayaṟpūti cāttavāykkāṟ kiḻ makiḻum
nilam mākāṇi Uḷḷiṭṭa tirunārāyaṇa vayakkal rūpāy �9m ciṟucey kīḻaivayakkal kiṇaṟṟaṅ
karaiyilum ṭṭi loṉṟuṭpaṭa van=ta nilam 1kāṇi (1/4)kaḥm Āka nilam � Innilam Oru māvaraikkāṇi mun=ti
rikai kiḻaraiye nālumākkāṇiyāl van=tatū nilattāl van=ta Epperppaṭṭa Iṟaikaḷum
candrādityavaṟ paḻantevatāṉappaṭi Iṟaiviḻa viṭṭukkuṭuttu Ivuttamaṉ pakkal koṇṭa co
ḻiya naṟpaḻaṅkācu 7 10 5 Ikkācu Eḻupattañcum koṇṭu Innilattāl van=ta Epperppaṭṭa
Iṟaiyum viḻaviṭṭu kuṭuttom mūlapariṣai mahāsabhai yom Itu śrī māheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 25.104 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
